metadata.description: Claude Code skills and plugins by hebstr.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Skills for code, skill, and MCP review workflows — orchestrated walkthroughs, full-project audits, adversarial critique, and circularity-aware cross-model review.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Skills for project workflow automation — file consistency sweeps and cross-repo synchronization.

plugins.name: litrev
plugins.description: Conduct systematic reviews, scoping reviews, meta-analyses, and evidence syntheses for medical, clinical, and health research. Bundles a Python MCP server (litrev-mcp) and 5 skills covering search, screening, extraction, and synthesis.
